signals.headline: [Context] Will Dogecoin reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026?
signals.raw:
**No definitive evidence confirms Dogecoin (DOGE) will reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026, but prediction markets assign a 34.8-37.6% probability, requiring roughly a 73-77% price increase from recent levels around $0.14-$0.15 within 265-274 days.** Current prices hover near $0.14-$0.15, with technical analyses targeting $0.16 as short-term resistance amid neutral-to-bullish momentum.[1][2][3]

### Current Status and Prediction Market
- Prediction market on whether DOGE hits $0.16 (per Binance 1-m
